name: Carnaval 2026
description: A Catholic celebration leading up to Lent, involving a reversal of social norms, costumes, city name changes, and parades.

name: Eindhoven Carnival (Lampegat)
description: The city is renamed Lampegat (lamp hole) after Philips. The official colours are orange and blue.

name: Carnival in Maastricht
description: Celebrations begin with the Prince’s Flag hoisting and 11 canon shots, featuring parades on Sunday, Monday, and Tuesday.

name: Vastelaovend in Limburg / Roermond Season Kick-off
description: The carnival season in the province of Limburg officially starts on November 11 with a large party in Roermond.

name: Heerlen Carnival (Heële)
description: A carnival celebration where the city adopts its traditional Limburgish name, Heële.

name: Venlo Carnival (Jocus Riék)
description: The city of Venlo is renamed Jocus Riék for the duration of the carnival festivities.

name: Den Bosch Carnival (Oeteldonk)
description: The city is renamed Oeteldonk and uses a frog symbol. It features a monarch's appearance on Sunday and a major parade on Monday.

name: Carnival Amsterdam
description: Less traditional than southern cities, featuring nightclub events and small costume-related activities for children.
